article_meta.title: Federal immigration officers board an elevator with respondents at immigration court in New York on 17 November 2025

reasoning: Multiple attribution violations flagging quoted activist language as author bias; some valid catches (e.g., 'spied', missing attribution), but also a mislabeled item and at least one missed author-level bias instance.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Flagged direct quotes ('Trump's corrupted Justice Department', 'ICE abductions...', and quoted activist statements) as bias, violating attribution rules.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Half the items are improper (quoted text) and one is weakly supported/miscast as opinion-as-fact.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed at least one clear author-level bias cue such as the subjective phrase 'rare rebuke'.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Correct labels for 'spied' (Word Choice) and missing attribution; but misapplied 'Opinion Statements Presented as Fact' to a factual assertion and used quotes to evidence 'Slant'.
